name: Vapi | SAH Kitchen | Get Product Tool

parameters.pythonCode:
import re
import json

# Get product data
product = items[0]["json"]

# Extract safely
product_id = product.get("id", "")
title = product.get("name", "")
price = product.get("price", "")
sku = product.get("sku", "")
stock_status = product.get("stock_status", "")
description = product.get("description", "")
permalink = product.get("permalink", "")
type = product.get("type", "")
sale_price = product.get("sale_price", "")
shipping_class = product.get("shipping_class", "")
category = ""
if "categories" in product and len(product["categories"]) > 0:
    category = product["categories"][0].get("name", "")


# Clean all text fields (remove special chars, HTML, etc.)
def clean(text):
    if not text:
        return ""
    text = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', str(text))        # remove HTML tags
    text = re.sub(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9 .,:%()/-]', '', text)  # keep only safe characters
    text = text.replace("\n", " ").replace("\r", " ")
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()        # normalize spaces
    return text

product_id = clean(product_id)
title = clean(title)
price = clean(price)
sku = clean(sku)
stock_status = clean(stock_status)
description = clean(description)
permalink = clean(permalink)
type = clean(type)
sale_price = clean(sale_price)
shipping_class = clean(shipping_class)
category = clean(category)


# Build message string
message = (
    f"Product ID: {product_id}, "
    f"Product title: {title}, "
    f"Price: {price}, "
    f"SKU: {sku}, "
    f"Stock status: {stock_status}, "
    f"URL: {permalink}. "
    f"Description: {description}, "
    f"Type: {type}, "
    f"Sale Price: {sale_price}, "
    f"Shipping: {shipping_class}, "
    f"Category: {category}"
)

# Ensure message is safe JSON string
message_json_safe = json.dumps(message)[1:-1]  # escape properly but remove quotes

# Return output
return [{"json": {"message": message_json_safe}}]
